title: Argentinian Potato Hash with Creamy Sides
description: A twist on traditional German potato dishes, this recipe combines the flavors of Argentina with a creamy twist. Serve as a side or light meal.
instructions: Peel and dice potatoes into 1-inch cubes.
Toss diced potatoes with 2 tablespoons oil and season with salt and pepper.
Spread potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, cook argentinian sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat, breaking up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add diced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until onion is translucent.
Stir in hash browns and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a separate saucepan, heat heavy cream over medium heat until warm.
To assemble, place roasted potatoes on a plate, top with sausage and onion mixture, and spoon creamy sauce over the top.
